mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_task (user_id, phase_index, task_index, phase_name, task_text, focus_area, completed) VALUES (#{userId}, #{phaseIndex}, #{taskIndex}, #{phaseName}, #{taskText}, #{focusArea}, #{completed})

INSERT INTO learning_task (user_id, phase_index, task_index, phase_name, task_text, focus_area, completed) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.phaseIndex}, #{item.taskIndex}, #{item.phaseName}, #{item.taskText}, #{item.focusArea}, #{item.completed})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM learning_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND phase_index = #{phaseIndex} AND task_index = #{taskIndex}
SELECT * FROM learning_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY phase_index, task_index
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_task WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM learning_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM learning_task WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND completed = #{completed}
